properties.descricao: Pope Leo expressed solidarity with Venezuelans after two deadly earthquakes claimed the lives of at least 1,400.

properties.descricao: Israeli forces restrict Palestinian worshippers at Al-Aqsa Mosque and block the call to prayer at the Ibrahimi Mosque.

properties.descricao: Interim President Delcy Rodriguez says at least 33 people rescued over the weekend, but tens of thousands still missing.

properties.titulo_evento: Mum of newborn rescued from Venezuela rubble says baby motivated her to stay alive
properties.descricao: The "miracle" rescue of 18-day-old baby Juan David is a symbol of hope in Venezuela after the devastating earthquakes.

properties.titulo_evento: US says it has agreed to 'stand down' after exchange of strikes with Iran
properties.descricao: A series of strikes over the weekend saw the US and Iran accuse each other of violating the ceasefire agreement.

properties.titulo_evento: Europe's heatwave linked to 1,300 deaths, WHO says, as Germany hits record 41.7C
properties.descricao: WHO chief Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus warned that Europe is not prepared for high temperatures.

properties.descricao: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain after the US said it hit multiple targets across Iran.

properties.descricao: Strikes have killed at least one person, state media say a day after Lebanon and Israel signed a framework agreement.

properties.titulo_evento: Bad Bunny lights up London with history-making stadium show
properties.descricao: Pride and a party as the Puerto Rican becomes the first Latin artist to headline a UK stadium.

properties.titulo_evento: Anger directed at Venezuela's official response to earthquake recovery
properties.descricao: Residents in quake-affected areas have expressed anger over the state's efforts to locate survivors and help victims, the BBC's Orla Guerin reports.

properties.titulo_evento: Heatwave: Berlin police use water cannon to cool Bruno Mars fans
properties.descricao: Berlin police used a water cannon to cool thousands of Bruno Mars fans queuing outside the Olympiastadion as temperatures soared during Europe's heatwave.

properties.titulo_evento: Australia and Vanuatu sign deal barring foreign military base on Pacific island
properties.descricao: China formed policing ties with Vanuatu in 2023 and has donated equipment including drones, patrol boats and vehicles to its police force.

properties.titulo_evento: Brussels marks 250th anniversary of US independence with concerts, fireworks and drone show
properties.descricao: Thousands gathered in Brussels for the US Embassy's "Freedom 250" celebration, marking the 250th anniversary of American independence with senior Belgian, US and NATO officials in attendance.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela search teams scramble as hope fades of finding earthquake survivors
properties.descricao: Experts say the first 72 hours after natural disasters define the narrow window for rescuing the living. After that the search usually becomes one of recovering bodies.

properties.titulo_evento: US and Iran agree to pause attacks and meet in Qatar
properties.descricao: US and Iran agree to halt strikes and hold talks in Qatar on Tuesday over Strait of Hormuz tensions,  US media reports.

properties.titulo_evento: Joy as man pulled from rubble three days after Venezuela quake
properties.descricao: Spanish and international rescue teams pulled a survivor from the rubble four days after deadly earthquakes struck Venezuela. Search operations continue as crews race to find more survivors, with the death toll rising to more than 1,400.

properties.descricao: A preliminary estimate from the United Nations Development Programme put the cost of direct physical damage caused by the quakes at $6.7 billion.

properties.titulo_evento: US and Iran trade strikes amid claims of ceasefire violations
properties.descricao: The US also carried out strikes on Iran on Friday after a drone attack on the M/V Ever Lovely ship. US aircraft targeted Iranian missile and drone storage locations as well as coastal radar sites, CENTCOM said.

properties.titulo_evento: Paris mortuaries overwhelmed as France counts victims of devastating heatwave

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela's earthquakes death toll nears 1,500, tens of thousands still missing
properties.descricao: The death toll from Venezuela’s devastating earthquakes neared 1,500 on Sunday as rescue workers raced against the clock to find survivors among the nearly 50,000 people still unaccounted for.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Temperatures plunge after historic heat wave
properties.descricao: A record-breaking heat wave has moved on, with temperatures sinking rapidly amid many storms. The foreign minister, Johann Wadephul, is heading to Washington for talks with his US counterpart, with NATO issues in focus.

properties.titulo_evento: US, Iran agree to halt strikes amid report of fresh talks
properties.descricao: A US official said both the US and Iran have agreed to pause their attacks and allow vessels to move through the Strait of Hormuz. Technical talks between the two sides are also set to resume on Tuesday.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia's Putin promises security as Ukraine ramps up attacks
properties.descricao: The Russian leader condemned what he called "terrorist attacks on our territory and infrastructure facilities." Ukraine has targeted oil refineries and weapons factories, causing massive disruption in recent weeks.

properties.titulo_evento: Argentina: Milei's top aide resigns over corruption scandal
properties.descricao: Manuel Adorni is mired in a corruption scandal but has denied wrongdoing. Javier Milei has defended Adorni, saying, "Manuel is innocent."

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine strikes Russian weapons plant, Moscow fuel hub
properties.descricao: The two attacks, in Volgograd and Vladimir regions, are part of President Zelenskyy's strategy to bring the war to the Russian people and force Putin into peace negotiations.

properties.titulo_evento: Why is Germany taking a big stake in a major tankmaker?
properties.descricao: The German government will buy a 40% stake in tankmaker KNDS. The deal is as much about control in the critical defense sector as it is about the Franco-German relationship.

properties.titulo_evento: Why Germany's Deutsche Bahn will face delays for many years
properties.descricao: Delayed, unreliable and forced into long detours due to construction: Germany no longer sets the pace when it comes to rail travel — and this is unlikely to change anytime soon. The company is mired in a deep crisis.

properties.titulo_evento: Military-age Ukrainian men could lose EU protection
properties.descricao: The European Commission has suggested withdrawing protection status for military-age Ukrainian males. A number of EU countries support the move — and so does Kyiv.

properties.titulo_evento: US and Iran agree to resume talks after weekend of strikes
properties.descricao: Washington has proposed this week's discussions, which are expected to center on the Strait of Hormuz, take place in Doha and begin as early as Tuesday.

properties.descricao: Präsentiert von Ørsted.
